steps.title: Interpret and identify the answer
steps.content:
The variable $x$ represents years since 2003, so $x = 0$ is the year 2003.

The $y$-intercept value of 8,500 represents the estimated number of brochures mailed in 2003.

The other choices incorrectly describe this as a minimum value or use the later estimated amount.

Choice D states the correct starting amount and year.
